events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: micron gauge read 359 at isolation (t=0) and rose to 4563 at t=10 min — a ~4200-micron climb that's far too large to be moisture off-gassing, indicating an active leak (most likely a defective braze joint from this service call, since cores were pulled and gauge read from the far port, ruling out hose/core artifacts). Decision: **fail**, risk **high** — system must not be charged; leak must be located (nitrogen/electronic/bubble test), repaired, and the evacuation/decay test repeated before charging.
